live_score_state.lead_change: OKC took first lead since early 1Q via Dort 3 at 7:50 Q3

q3_early_segment.diagnosis: OKC three-point normalization arrived before SGA full scoring activation. Spurs offense stalled once first-half offensive rebound advantage cooled.

liveflow_decision.primary_edge: OKC TT Over 106.5 at +128 has become the cleanest plus-money live angle if available before the line rises.
liveflow_decision.edge_rationale: OKC needs 49 points over the final 19:33. The offense has already normalized from three, Jalen/Chet are active, and SGA has not yet produced a scoring burst. Market is still pricing OKC TT as if full-game offensive drag remains dominant.
liveflow_decision.risk: If SGA remains passive or Spurs re-establish Wemby offensive rebound dominance, this can stall. Do not pair with full-game over due correlation and RISK_CLUSTER_LOCK.

Full game Over 205.5 is playable only as a lean, not a better strike than OKC TT because it requires SAS contribution too.
OKC -3.5 is acceptable but less efficient than TT due endgame spread volatility.
